title: More Nonsense Limerick 78
content:
There was an old person of Bray,
    Who sang through the whole of the day
    To his ducks and his pigs, 
    Whom he fed upon figs,
    That valuable person of Bray.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 78"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
